name: one-click dev and deploy website
description: Dev & Deploy is an automation-first skill that helps AI agents and developers quickly build and publish web apps to Cloudflare Pages with minimal manual steps: it interprets deployment intent, validates and repairs environment prerequisites, supports custom or existing project sources, optionally initializes Git and creates/pushes a GitHub repository, performs deployment with Wrangler (including token-based auth for non-interactive environments), and finishes with retry-based accessibility checks while reporting clear outputs such as local path, live URL, and any remaining manual actions.
